## Release Inputs

- Version:
- Approved PR:
- Signed tag:

## Required Evidence

- [ ] PR merged into `main`
- [ ] PR has approved review decision
- [ ] Required checks passed
- [ ] Release tag is annotated and GitHub-verified
- [ ] Draft release generated from the reviewed merge commit
- [ ] Rollback notes are known
